# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_check_http_auth_extracts_username_from_http_auth_headers__a1():
    source = open('/workspace/edb/server/protocol/protocol.pyx', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert "user = 'edgedb'" not in source, "HttpProtocol._check_http_auth must not hardcode user='edgedb'; it should extract the username from JWT 'bearer' or Basic auth / X-EdgeDB-User so cfg::Auth.user works for non-default roles."

def test_check_http_auth_extracts_username_from_http_auth_headers__a2():
    source = open('/workspace/edb/server/protocol/protocol.pyx', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert re.search('extract_http_user\\s*\\(', source), 'HttpProtocol._check_http_auth should call auth_helpers.extract_http_user(...) to determine the role/username from the request auth data.'

def test_check_http_auth_extracts_username_from_http_auth_headers__a3():
    source = open('/workspace/edb/server/protocol/protocol.pyx', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'get_auth_method(\n                username' in source or 'get_auth_method(\n                username,' in source, "HttpProtocol._check_http_auth should fetch auth method for the extracted username (role), not for a hardcoded 'edgedb' user."

# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_simple_http_default_auth_is_password_not_scram__a1():
    source = open('/workspace/edb/server/args.py', 'rt', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert re.search('\\bPassword\\s*=\\s*[\'\\"]Password[\'\\"]', source), "Expected ServerAuthMethod to define a distinct Password enum value (Password = 'Password') to avoid implying SIMPLE_HTTP uses SCRAM."

def test_simple_http_default_auth_is_password_not_scram__a2():
    source = open('/workspace/edb/server/args.py', 'rt', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert re.search('ServerConnTransport\\.SIMPLE_HTTP\\s*:\\s*ServerAuthMethod\\.Password', source), 'Expected DEFAULT_AUTH_METHODS to map SIMPLE_HTTP to Password (ServerAuthMethod.Password), not Scram.'
